title: Bilde1
description: All characters from SpongeBob SquarePants, painted on my living room table. Took 6 months and was one of the first things I started to paint.

title: Bilde2
description: A painting for a friend. All the 'squares' are different memories from growing up.

title: Bilde3
description: SpongeBob painting with different characters from the series.

title: Bilde4
description: A painting of me as a dark tree screaming out all the pain — and good colors starting to come at the end of the branches.

title: Bilde5
description: A painting with a lot of different characters, many of which have been in different paintings before. There's also a SpongeBob in pieces — can you find them all?

title: Bilde6
description: Good trip, bad trip. Right side is the good trip, left side is the bad trip. Lighter colors on the right, darker on the left — a colorful painting.

title: Bilde7
description: Different 'squares' each have a joke painting. On the left side: word 'fued' with people fighting and holding up signs — one side saying football, the other side soccer.

title: Bilde8
description: A colorful painting of a cousin sitting in a hammock by the lake.

title: Bilde9
description: A crazy painting with googly eyes. Each different 'square' has its own special absurd creature.

title: Bilde10
description: A music album cover for (me) Awesome Change, with some throwbacks to different paintings.

title: Bilde11
description: Magical Painter — a painting of a magical painter in his cave where he and his magical painting brushes create magical paintings.

title: Bilde12
description: A painting that says 'I can't paint but I can still have fun with paint.' Four squares: first says 'painting tag', second says 'put the paint brush in the can', third says 'paint boxing', last says 'musical paint'. Each square is a play on an activity.

title: Bilde13
description: A painting made before Bilde11. When the magical painter 'sheds' off worries, the cave door opens and he steps in to become the Magical Painter.

title: Bilde14
description: A painting of the light door to heaven — where you see your loved ones.

title: Bilde15
description: Another painting where different 'squares' have different creatures and jokes — like 'buy 1 get 2 for free' with a shelf filled with 1s and 2s.

title: Bilde17
description: A painting for a couple who got married. Hands holding a heart, the couple on a swing in the middle of the heart, with 2 birds flying in carrying 2 rings.

title: Bilde18
description: A painting on the game Rocket League — featuring me and my friends. My friend is scoring, and people are holding signs saying things he usually says while playing.

title: Bilde19
description: A painting of a young girl riding a blue unicorn with a pink background, rainbow and smiling clouds.

title: Bilde20
description: A painting of Donkey Kong Country game cover. Donkey Kong carrying bananas, Diddy Kong riding Rambi the Rhino, with Gnawty, Zingers, Slippa and Squawks. One of my favorite Super Nintendo games.
